title: Macaw's Biomes O' Plenty
description: A compatibility between Macaw's Mods and the different woods of Biomes O' Plenty
body:
This mod adds compatibility between Macaw's Bridges and Biomes O' Plenty, have you always dreamed of making a bridges/roofs or stairs out of cherry wood... well thanks to this mod it is now something possible!

I had installed Macaw's Bridges/Fences/Roofs/Furnitures - BOP, I am afraid that by installing this mod it will delete all my bridges already placed.

Don't worry,

For forge version mod converts all the old blocks and items from the old compatibilitie.

For fabric a mod has been used, you'll need to use this mod with a pre-filled configuration file to automatically replace the blocks, these files are generated when the game is launched like the config files - more information [here](https://github.com/Samlegamer/Macaw-s-Addons/issues/2)

For neoforge version 1.20.6 convert don't work, it's a problem of neoforge.

This mod supported :  

- Macaw's Bridges
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Tanquv9C/images/380fe358f87c1af887509d976e825afe71a66848.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Tanquv9C/images/380fe358f87c1af887509d976e825afe71a66848.png)

**Required Depedency:**

[AddonsLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/addonslib)

[Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)

[Terrablender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender) for 1.18.2+

[GlitchCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/glitchcore) for 1.20.1+

**Optional Dependency:**

[Macaw's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw)

[Configurable Everything](https://modrinth.com/mod/configurable-everything)
